basic_details.short_information: Central University of Tamil Nadu (CUTN) Counsellor Notification 2026 has been released on 01 July 2026 on the official website https://cutn.ac.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the CUTN Counsellor Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Phil. in Clinical Psychology / Rehabilitation Psychology from a recognized University/Institution recognized by the Rehabilitation Council of India (RCI), Ph.D. in Counselling Psychology/ Psychology with counselling experience
qualification.details: M.Phil. in Clinical Psychology / Rehabilitation Psychology from a recognized University/Institution recognized by the Rehabilitation Council of India (RCI). Ph.D. in Counselling Psychology/ Psychology with counselling experience.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CUTN Counsellor Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 17-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download CUTN Counsellor Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.central_university_of_tamil_nadu_cutn: M.Phil. in Clinical Psychology / Rehabilitation Psychology from a recognized University/Institution recognized by the Rehabilitation Council of India (RCI), Ph.D. in Counselling Psychology/ Psychology with counselling experience

content_sections.heading: CUTN Counsellor Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CUTN Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CUTN Counsellor Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CUTN Counsellor Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: M.Phil. in Clinical Psychology / Rehabilitation Psychology from a recognized University/Institution recognized by the Rehabilitation Council of India (RCI). Ph.D. in Counselling Psychology/ Psychology with counselling experience.

content_sections.heading: CUTN Counsellor Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for CUTN Counsellor Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 17-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CUTN Counsellor recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the CUTN Counsellor position is 17th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Counsellor post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Phil. in Clinical Psychology or Rehabilitation Psychology, or a Ph.D. in Counselling Psychology/Psychology with relevant counselling experience from a recognized institution.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Counsellor position at CUTN?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Counsellor post is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the government's regulations.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Counsellor post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Counsellor position at the Central University of Tamil Nadu.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Counsellor role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Counsellor post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 50,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process involves sending your complete bio-data and self-attested documents via email to the official email address provided in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the CUTN Counsellor recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Counsellor position?
faq.answer: The selection of candidates for the Counsellor post will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Counsellor position at CUTN is a contractual job.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the Central University of Tamil Nadu located?
faq.answer: The Central University of Tamil Nadu is located in Thiruvarur, Tamil Nadu.
